It then lists several things not to do: avoid touching co-workers, don't avoid eye contact, don't have a bad handshake, and don't lean your head while listening. These are all specific tips about proper body language in an office setting. Looking at the options: A) Pay attention to your body language at the office. C) The meaning of body language you should know. This is a bit vague. The passage isn't just explaining meanings but giving advice on what to avoid in a professional setting.
